---

title: "D04_06: App Data Publishing"
subtitle: "Publish app-ready Poisson analysis data (visualization handled in app)"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_06"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on: []
outputs_to:
  - "app_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all"
  - "processed_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_{product_line}"
  - "processed_data.df_precision_features"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D04_06.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "all_D04_06.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_06: App Data Publishing {#overview}

This task publishes app-ready Poisson analysis tables. DRV prepares data only; visualization and rendering are handled by app modules.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| Cyberbiz | `cbz_D04_06.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/cbz/` | `app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_*` |
| All | `all_D04_06.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/all/` | `processed_data.df_precision_features` |

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
# D04_06: Publish app-ready Poisson analysis tables (no visualization artifacts)
PUBLISH D04_06_app_data_publish:
  FOR CBZ:
    RUN cbz_D04_02         # writes app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all
  FOR EBY:
    RUN eby_D04_02         # no D04_06 wrapper for EBY
  FOR ALL_PLATFORMS:
    RUN all_D04_09         # writes processed_data.df_precision_features
```

## Platform Preconditions

- **CBZ**: Requires D04_04 (wrapper to CBZ time series ETL) when
  `app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}` is not yet built.
- **EBY**: Requires `D04_04` (wrapper to ETL time series) to generate inputs for `eby_D04_02`.
- **ALL**: Requires transformed precision tables; D04_09 handles missing inputs with empty schema.

## Output Tables

- `app_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all`
- `processed_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_{product_line}`
- `processed_data.df_precision_features` (ALL)

## App Consumption

App modules render visualizations directly from the analysis tables:

- `poissonTimeAnalysis`
- `poissonFeatureAnalysis`
- `poissonCommentAnalysis`

DRV does not generate plotly or dashboard artifacts. Presentation remains in the app layer.

**App data pattern**: UI reads `df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all` and filters by
`product_line_id` when needed; per-product-line tables stay in `processed_data`.

**Note**: D04_06 is wrapper-only for CBZ/ALL; use `eby_D04_02.R` directly for EBY.
